text: Berkshire Hathaway to Buy Taylor Morrison for $6.8 Billion - Bloomberg.com
fullText: Berkshire Hathaway Inc. will acquire Taylor Morrison Home Corp. in an all-cash deal worth about $6.8 billion, the first major purchase under chief executive Greg Abel and a vote of confidence in America’s housing market.

text: Dell is bringing back the XPS 13 as a MacBook Neo competitor — with a temporary discount to $599 - The Verge
fullText: Dell is bringing back the XPS 13, but the new model is now aimed at the MacBook Neo, with 8GB of RAM and a temporary starting price of $599 for students.

text: Marta Kostyuk stuns 4-time champion Iga Swiatek on big day for Ukraine at French Open - AP News
fullText: There will be a first-time women’s champion at the French Open this year, with two Ukrainian players among the top contenders. Marta Kostyuk, undefeated on clay this season, reached the quarterfinals by defeating four-time champion Iga Swiatek. Kostyuk will f…

text: Stock futures are flat in overnight trading as June trading begins near record highs: Live updates - CNBC
fullText: Stocks wrapped up a strong May, with all three major indexes posting solid gains.

text: YouTubers are setting box office records. It could change the future of moviemaking - CNN
fullText: The success of “Obsession” and “Backrooms” may mean some studio bosses will place a few more bets on original concepts rather than predictable franchises and sequels.

text: Trump health readout leaves key blanks unfilled - Axios
fullText: The medical report didn't put to rest questions about bruising on Trump's hands, swollen ankles and his alertness.

text: Trump floats MAGA rally instead of concert after musicians drop out of Freedom 250 - NPR
fullText: Several artists, including country singer Martina McBride, have withdrawn from the Great American State Fair in Washington, D.C.

text: United Airlines flight to Spain pulls U-turn, apparently over Bluetooth device name - NPR
fullText: The flight to Palma de Mallorca diverted back to Newark late on Saturday. Air traffic audio and social media posts indicate an onboard Bluetooth device raised security concerns.

text: ‘Landmark’ pancreatic cancer drug keeps patients alive for twice as long - The Washington Post
fullText: The highly anticipated results of a clinical trial for the pill, daraxonrasib, have been released, giving doctors hope for treating the stubbornly lethal disease.

text: Sherrill, Newark mayor back partial curfew in New Jersey’s largest city - Politico
fullText: The move is another attempt by New Jersey Democrats to avoid federal intervention.

text: Blast at building storing explosives in Myanmar kills more than 45 people - AP News
fullText: A blast on Sunday at a building in northeastern Myanmar has killed more than 45 people. Rescue workers and independent media report the building was storing explosives for mining. The explosion injured about 70 others in the village of Kaungtup, Namhkam towns…

text: Leak Tips Potential New ASUS ROG Xbox Ally Gaming Handheld - TechPowerUp
fullText: It was previously revealed that ASUS may be launching an update to the ASUS ROG Ally gaming handheld at Computex 2026, but not much was known about the new handheld at the time. Now, thanks to licensing documentation from the Korean National Radio Research Ag…

text: Man charged with murder in killings of 3 on Hawaii’s Big Island - CNN
fullText: Authorities in Hawaii have charged a 36-year-old man with murder in the killings of three people in a remote community known for its eclectic, communal lifestyle.

text: Russia Can No Longer Take More Land Than Ukraine Liberates, Zelenskyy Says - UNITED24 Media
fullText: Zelenskyy states Russia lost battlefield initiative in Dec 2025, arguing Ukraine has a diplomacy window before winter if sanctions pressure on Russia continues.

text: Matt Brown, ‘Alaskan Bush People’ Star, Dies at 42 - Variety
fullText: Matt Brown, star of the Discovery docudrama series 'Alaskan Bush People,' has died. He was 43.

text: We couldn't afford to pay for my mom's dementia assisted living anymore. She moved into a tiny house next door to me. - Business Insider
fullText: Lori Bufka, 64, cares for her mother with dementia. Assisted living became too expensive, so Bufka moved her into a trailer next to their home.

text: Africa CDC Says Over 1,100 Suspected Ebola Cases In DR Congo And Uganda - Barron's
fullText: More than 1,100 people were suspected of having contracted Ebola in the Democratic Republic of Congo and neighbouring Uganda, the head of the African Union's health agency said on Sunday in a commentary for the Financial Times.

text: TechCrunch Mobility: It doesn’t matter that people hate the Ferrari Luce - TechCrunch
fullText: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility, your hub for the future of transportation and now, more than ever, how AI is playing a part.

text: Could Democrats be shut out of the California governor’s race? - Al Jazeera
fullText: California is a Democrat stronghold, but thanks to the state’s jungle primary, Republicans are frontrunners to advance.
